title: ammannia auriculata var. bojeriana
intro: Ammannia auriculata var. bojeriana, also known as 'Red Back', is a plant species within the Lythraceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ammannia auriculata var. bojeriana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and aid in skin infections treatment. Herbal preparations often involve the leaves and roots of this plant, typically used as a decoction or infusion in traditional medicine practices.
